text:
locate the information you need, please contact ResDAC.
| SAS Name | Variable Name | 
|---|---|
| ACO_ID | Pioneer ACO Identifier | 
| CLNDR_YR | Year of ACO Source Record | 
| PRVDR_CLASS | Provider Class | 
| ORG_TIN | Billing TIN of ACO Participant | 
| ORG_NPI | National Provider Identifier (NPI) for Organization | 
| ORG_CCN | CMS Certification Number | 
| IND_NPI | NPI for Practitioner | 
| ORG_NAME | Legal Business Name Associated with the ACO Participant TIN | 
| LAST_NAME | Last Name
